D3DCOPYRECTSTATE

Describes the state used in IDirect3DDevice8::CopyRects.

typedef struct _D3DCOPYRECTSTATE    // Xbox extension
{
    D3DCOPYRECTCOLORFORMAT ColorFormat;
    D3DCOPYRECTOPERATION Operation;

    BOOL ColorKeyEnable;
    DWORD ColorKeyValue;

    DWORD BlendAlpha;
    DWORD PremultAlpha;

    // Clipping Rect
    DWORD ClippingPoint;
    DWORD ClippingSize;

} D3DCOPYRECTSTATE;

Members

ColorFormat
Member of the D3DCOPYRECTCOLORFORMAT enumerated type. This describes the source and destination surface formats used in CopyRects. If the surfaces are compressed, this must be D3DCOPYRECT_COLOR_FORMAT_DEFAULT.
Operation
Member of the D3DCOPYRECTOPERATION enumerated type. This describes the operation that CopyRects should perform between the source and destination surfaces.
ColorKeyEnable
TRUE to enable color-key operations. This value must be FALSE if the Operation member is D3DCOPYRECT_BLEND_PREMULT.
ColorKeyValue
Color value used in color-key operations.
BlendAlpha
This value is used only when the Operation member is D3DCOPYRECT_BLEND_AND. Bits 30:21 contain the 10-bit unsigned fraction of the alpha value. Bit 31:31 contains the 1-bit signed integer of the alpha value.
PremultAlpha
This value is used only when the Operation member is either D3DCOPYRECT_SRCCOPY_PREMULT or D3DCOPYRECT_BLEND_PREMULT. Using this, each color channel can specify its own alpha value.
ClippingPoint
Describes the coordinates of the upper left corner of the clipping rectangle. The x and y coordinates are each stored as 16-bit signed integers using the following format:
(y << 16) | x
ClippingSize
Describes the size of the clipping rectangle. The height and width are each stored as 16-bit unsigned integers using the following format:
(height << 16) | width

Remarks

This state is set using IDirect3DDevice8::SetCopyRectsState.

Swizzled surfaces support neither clipping rectangles nor the D3DCOPYRECT_ROP_AND operation.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in D3d8types.h.

See Also

IDirect3DDevice8::CopyRects, IDirect3DDevice8::GetCopyRectsState, IDirect3DDevice8::SetCopyRectsState
